title: scolymus maculatus
intro: Scolymus maculatus, also known as artichoke thistle or artichoke, is a perennial thistle plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its edible buds and leaves. The medicinal properties of Scolymus maculatus include its ability to stimulate digestion and liver function due to its high content of inulin and saponins. The health benefits of consuming Scolymus maculatus include its potential to reduce cholesterol levels, improve blood sugar control, and support overall digestive health. Herbal preparations of Scolymus maculatus can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to support liver and digestive function.
